description: Stock levels per product per warehouse. Tracks available and reserved quantities.

chunks.text:
TABLE: inventory

DESCRIPTION: Stock levels per product per warehouse. Tracks available and reserved quantities.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: inventory, stock, stock levels, available quantity, warehouse stock, product availability, stock check

PRIMARY_KEY: inventory_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: product_id → products.product_id, warehouse_id → warehouses.warehouse_id

COLUMNS: inventory_id, product_id, warehouse_id, quantity_available, quantity_reserved, reorder_point, last_restock_date, last_stock_check, bin_location

USE_CASES: Stock availability, low stock alerts, warehouse inventory, reorder planning

metadata.text:

USE_CASES: Stock availability, low stock alerts, warehouse inventory, reorder planning
